$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6. 5th canonical D14 cycle JSON. 1st D11-icon-reuse instance in M5.5 (D14); 1st instance of pre-existing-tight-baseline iterative-cuts pattern.

content_class_declaration.ceiling_band_rationale: standard_reading_guide.md is the canonical reader-conversion surface routing newcomers through the 1,336-line aDNA Universal Standard via 3 persona-based paths. Adopter-conversion class 30-70% ceiling per M5.4 D12 lightweight AAR Finding. M5.5 mission spec §S2 cycle 125 sets target 100-115 from 161 (~30%).
content_class_declaration.ceiling_compliance_note: 31.1% sits 1.1pp above 30% nominal lower bound; squarely in 30-70% adopter-conversion band. Absolute target 100-115 lines MET at 111 lines. NOTE: required 2-pass iterative-cut approach — 1st pass (10.6%, 144 lines) UNDER-TARGET due to pre-existing 4.3/5.0 persona baseline density; 2nd pass cuts to §4 Skill-vs-Lattice comparison-table + §5 Quick Reference + §1 path-section bullet-runs achieved band compliance.

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: 2 surgical passes via Write + 3 Edits: (1) initial Write replacement with §3+§4 prose tightening + §5 minor trim + D11 icons added — landed at 144 lines (10.6%); (2) 3 surgical Edits: §4 comparison + scenario tables collapsed to 2 narrative paragraphs; §5 Quick Reference verbose-suffix trim + 1-row drop (collision prevention §13 covered by §1 routing); §1 numbered lists compressed to arrow-chain narrative — final at 111 lines (31.1%). D11 icons reused via 6 inline `` tags: 3 in summary table + 3 in subsection headers + relative path `../../site/src/assets/icons/icon_{learn,how,reference}.svg`.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A — UX Writer + Newcomer + IA + Visual Designer (D11-icon adapt cycle; Visual primary)
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style + Q2 Clarity + Q3 Conciseness + Q4 Bloat + Q5 Comprehension

persona_consensus.ux_writer: File starts tight (4.5/5.0 style baseline). §1 numbered lists per path are scannable but vertical-heavy. §4 comparison table is reference-clear but verbose. D11 icons add gentle visual cuing without distracting from text. Score 4.5/5.0 baseline.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: Persona-routing in §1 + §2 section map is genuinely useful — newcomer can self-route. §3 Design Document section is unnecessary scaffolding. §4 skill-vs-lattice question is THE clarifying value of this doc. Score 4.0/5.0 baseline.
persona_consensus.information_architect: Cross-doc anchored reference at `how/skills/AGENTS.md` to §4 heading must be preserved through any §4 prose changes (anchor based on heading slug). §2 Section Map is canonical reference card — keep. Score 5.0/5.0 baseline.
persona_consensus.visual_designer: Currently text-only document — adopter-conversion class with visual differentiation potential via D11 icons. 3 persona paths get 3 distinct icons (learn / how / reference). Inline `` width=16-18 appropriate for body-text scale. Score 4.5/5.0 baseline.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 4/4 personas approve. D11 icon adapt is high-value visual change. §4 + §5 + §1 tightening required for band compliance. Anchor preservation honored (§4 heading slug stable across edits).

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO new image generation — D11 SECTION ICONS REUSED per operator decision at plan-approval. 6 inline `` references to existing `site/src/assets/icons/icon_{learn,how,reference}.svg` (3 distinct icons used; each appears 2× in file — once in summary table + once in subsection header). Cumulative v8 P5 image-gen ledger UNCHANGED at $1.72 of $50 (3.4%).
step_3_generate_or_regen_images.d11_icon_reuse_adapt_disposition: 1st canonical D11-icon-reuse instance in M5.5 (mission spec §S2 cycle 125 ratifies cycles 125-126 as D11-icon-reuse window per operator decision at plan-approval).
step_3_generate_or_regen_images.d13_substrate_dependency_disposition: ADAPTED — D13 infographic substrate deferred at plan-approval; D11 icons reused as visual differentiation pattern instead.
step_3_generate_or_regen_images.path_correction_note: Mission spec §S2 cycle 125 references `site/src/components/icons/section_*.svg` but actual location is `site/src/assets/icons/icon_*.svg`; this cycle adapts to actual path. Inbound-reference convention for what/docs/ Markdown: relative path `../../site/src/assets/icons/`.
